value_picks.name: Estée Lauder Companies
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading near 52-week lows amid consumer spending slowdown and merger discussions, despite strong brand portfolio.
value_picks.bull_case: Premium beauty demand recovery with China market rebound will drive margins higher; durable franchise undervalued at current multiples.

value_picks.name: Carnival Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Hit hard by fuel cost spikes from Iran conflict, near 52w lows despite positive FCF generation.
value_picks.bull_case: Cruise demand remains robust post-pandemic; cost controls and pricing power position for strong recovery as oil stabilizes.

value_picks.name: United Airlines Holdings
value_picks.why_undervalued: Oil price surge pressured airlines to 52w lows, but low multiples and positive FCF reflect cyclical trough.
value_picks.bull_case: Travel rebound and capacity discipline will boost earnings; strong balance sheet supports dividend resumption.

value_picks.name: Stryker Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Healthcare laggard near lows due to market rotation, fundamentally sound medtech leader.
value_picks.bull_case: Aging population drives procedure growth; innovation pipeline ensures durable revenue expansion.

value_picks.name: Unilever PLC
value_picks.why_undervalued: Consumer staples beaten down in volatile market, trading near lows with stable FCF.
value_picks.bull_case: Defensive franchise with emerging market exposure; pricing and efficiency gains to lift profitability.

momentum_picks.name: SanDisk Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Explosive demand for storage solutions amid AI data center boom and supply chain recovery.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High momentum in semis but vulnerable to cycle peak; favorable risk/reward near term.

momentum_picks.name: Lumentum Holdings
momentum_picks.catalyst: Optics and photonics surge from AI infrastructure buildout and data transmission needs.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Strong AI tailwinds outweigh valuation risks in breakout phase.

momentum_picks.name: LyondellBasell
momentum_picks.catalyst: Oil price rally from Iran tensions boosts chemical margins and feedstock advantages.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Commodity cycle upswing offers asymmetric upside vs demand slowdown risk.

momentum_picks.name: Dow Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Energy sector rotation amid higher oil; strong Q1 earnings beat on pricing power.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Broad chemical exposure hedges energy volatility effectively.

momentum_picks.name: APA Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Geopolitical oil supply disruptions propel E&P profits; acquisition synergies realized.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Levered to oil but diversified assets mitigate downside.

watchlist_updates.detail: XOM closed at 156.12 on March 13, up 1.69% that day amid WTI crude rising to $99.64 due to Iran conflict.
Chevron advanced with energy sector up 2.5% week on oil surge from Middle East tensions.
Adobe shares plummeted over 5% after CEO Shantanu Narayen announced intention to step down despite Q1 earnings beat.
Ulta Beauty fell 12% after reporting Q4 profit of $8.01/share below expected $8.03.
Stryker hit near 52-week low of $319 range on March 12 at $337, closing $336.77 on March 13.
Abbott Laboratories hit 52-week low around $101 during late March market weakness.
Daiwa reiterated buy rating with $215 target ahead of GTC conference.
Boeing up 3.73% in S&P 500 movers early March.
